title: Cross-validation & data leakage + DSA Binary Search
focus: k-fold, stratified, time-series CV, nested CV, leak prevention.

items.label: k-fold, stratified, leave-one-out, time-series CV
interviewQuestions: When does k-fold leak data, and what does TimeSeriesSplit do differently?
Why is stratified k-fold important for imbalanced classification?

items.label: Train/val/test split & nested CV
interviewQuestions: Why do you need both a validation and a test set for hyperparameter tuning?
What is nested cross-validation and when is it worth the cost?
How would your split strategy change for time-series forecasting vs random tabular rows?

items.label: Common forms of data leakage
interviewQuestions: Walk through three common ways data leakage sneaks into an ML pipeline.
How would you build a pipeline that prevents leakage when scaling features?
Why does standard k-fold leak data on time-series, and what does TimeSeriesSplit do differently?
Walk through three real ways data leakage sneaks into an ML pipeline and how you'd prevent each.
Why do you need both a validation and a test set for hyperparameter tuning — can't you just use one?
How do you evaluate a time-series model without accidentally training on the future?
